industries.name: Hotels
industries.description: Hospitality and hotel management knowledge framework
industries.promptContext: You are generating enterprise knowledge for the hotel and hospitality industry. Focus on guest experience, operational excellence, revenue optimization, and brand standards. Use industry-standard terminology: PMS (Property Management System), RevPAR, ADR, OTA, STR, front desk, concierge, housekeeping.

industries.name: Restaurants
industries.description: Food service and restaurant operations knowledge framework
industries.promptContext: You are generating enterprise knowledge for the restaurant and food service industry. Focus on service quality, kitchen efficiency, food safety, and guest experience. Use industry-standard terminology: FOH (Front of House), BOH (Back of House), POS, covers, COGS, mise en place, ticket time, table turn.

industries.name: Medical Clinics
industries.description: Primary care and specialty clinic knowledge framework
industries.promptContext: You are generating enterprise knowledge for medical clinics and healthcare practices. Focus on patient safety, clinical workflow, regulatory compliance, and operational efficiency. Use industry-standard terminology: EHR/EMR, SOAP notes, CPT codes, ICD-10, prior authorization, referral, HIPAA. Note: do not generate actual medical advice or clinical protocols.

industries.name: Real Estate
industries.description: Real estate brokerage and property management knowledge framework
industries.promptContext: You are generating enterprise knowledge for real estate brokerages and property management firms. Focus on client service, transaction efficiency, market knowledge, and compliance. Use industry-standard terminology: MLS, CMA, escrow, cap rate, NOI, listing agreement, buyer representation, days on market, commission.

industries.name: Travel Agencies
industries.description: Travel planning and agency operations knowledge framework
industries.promptContext: You are generating enterprise knowledge for travel agencies and tour operators. Focus on client experience, booking accuracy, destination expertise, and operational reliability. Use industry-standard terminology: GDS, IATA, PNR, booking class, itinerary, land package, commission, net rate, TICO/ASTA compliance.
